title: Hormozi - Best Gift (Should Charge)
transcript: The best gift I can possibly give business owners this year is something that I should charge for and just make it free. And so that's exactly what I'm gonna do. And so my team spent 200 plus hours reviewing portfolio companies and companies we advised to figure out exactly where people got stuck at each revenue level and looked at it across function. So that means marketing, sales, CS, finance, legal, tech, ops, the whole gamut, and more importantly, not where they get stuck, but how to get unstuck at each revenue level. It's a gift. It's absolutely free. If you want that, it'll give you a customized scaling roadmap to where you're at right now and what specific actions to take. The whole thing's a gift. No strings attached. So if you want it, click, put your information in, and it'll send it to you all personalized. And uh yeah, it rocks. And so you should use it. That's all I got.

hook.text: The best gift I can possibly give business owners this year is something that I should charge for and just make it free.

sections.name: Hook - Gift + perceived value
sections.summary: Debería cobrar pero lo hace gratis. Valor percibido instantáneo.

key_phrases: should charge for and just make it free

analysis.emotional_arc: Generosidad (te regalo algo valioso) → credibilidad (200 horas de research) → acción simple
strengths: 'Should charge for it' eleva valor percibido sin poner precio
Tono ultra casual al final ('it rocks', 'that's all I got') genera cercanía
Repite 'gift' 3 veces para anclar que es regalo
patterns_to_replicate: Patrón VALOR PERCIBIDO: decir que deberías cobrar algo pero lo hacés gratis
Cierre ultra casual: 'that's all I got' humaniza y baja la guardia
Repetición de 'gift/free/no strings' para eliminar objeciones de costo
